rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Gov't Code §2306.116, which governs amended annual budget procedures for a board. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 2306.116. AMENDED ANNUAL BUDGET. (a) The board may adopt an amended annual budget during the fiscal year.
_note: Rule text concerns housing board budget procedures; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
